allowed_work: Prepare HRA-first online Handelsregister application packages.
Check eID, Bundesnotarkammer app, notary appointment and signature readiness.
For notary-side workflows, require the XNP-Prüfung before XNotar or filing handoff work.
Prepare metadata-only evidence for human-approved register application workflows.
prohibited_work: Store passwords, PINs, private keys, certificate material, session cookies, or one-time codes in Git.
Bypass notarial review, legal review or explicit applicant approval.
Upload client or mandate content to an LLM unless an explicit approved data-processing basis exists.
Retrieve register data, scrape protected portals or submit applications automatically.
day0: Confirm mode: citizen preflight or notary-side workstation workflow.
For notary-side workflow, confirm XNP-Prüfung first.
Confirm legal form, register track and whether the case is HRA or HRB.
Confirm applicant role, notary route, eID readiness and Bundesnotarkammer app readiness.
day1: Generate online application readiness plan, missing-information list and notary evidence checklist.
day2: Review rejected applications, missing attachments, identity/signature failures and evidence completeness.
required_accounts_or_approvals: Notary appointment or notary office workflow
Applicant and reviewer approval for the register application package
